title: BEST top for tennis!
review_text: This is hands down the best light weight top for tennis. I have it in six colors, though I am quite unhappy that LuLu is not making the cropped version in lots of colors like they used to. I REALLY REALLY Wished they would bring it back in colors (just like the full length sculpt). I am having to shop elsewhere to find something similar to the cropped version:((((( PLEASE PLEASE BRING BACK THE CROPPED IN COLORS!!!

title: Don’t purchase
review_text: Tried this on for my daughter who is tall and has bigger breast, I went up a size cause is was tight, got it home she tried it in and it fit to the tee. Next day goes to put it on and it has a big huge hole in the pocket. It came unthreaded well I called and talked to them and sense she wore it once or for maybe 4 hours they will not exchange it or give my money back it was $175 .

title: Liner not good wuality
review_text: I loved these shorts, but unfortunately, the inner liner gets worn out extremely quickly. I have only worn them max 20 times maybe and had them for just over a year, and there are holes throughout the material and now making it uncomfortable for wear since there is no longer material in certain areas. Not good. Would not recommend or buy again.

title: Too long
review_text: Did the style of this top change? I have one similar with a cutout in the back. I don’t like this new style it’s a little long. Wish Lululemon wouldn’t keep changing styles. Makes it hard to be a repeat customer. I bought this for my half marathon and returned it. Bring back the old style with the mesh and the cutout in the back that was a little shorter.

title: Have this in many colors
review_text: Love this top for CrossFit and running. I have it in many colors. I only wish you’d bring back the back pleat. It provides just a little extra space and breeze.

title: Size marked wrong - final sale
review_text: Shorts were marked as 7” but when I got them home they were only 5”. I bought them for my son so they weren’t tried on to realize that they were marked wrong. They were from the outlet so final sale.

title: Pickleball Top
review_text: Love the style, the length and the fit of the tank. I would love it even more if the shoulders were a bit wider for a broad shouldered older woman who appreciates a bit more coverage.

title: Thin and poor quality
review_text: I really love the fit of these shirts and how incredibly comfortable they are, especially for the summer. However, the quality is really poor. I purchased two, one in white and one in lilac, and I was totally in love with them until they both snagged on the second or third wear. Mind you, all I’m doing is wearing them to go to Pilates and drive around doing errands so there is no reason for these to have snagged already. I am also washing them in a delicate cycle and air drying. Disappointed!

title: Did not receive
review_text: Did not receive and was denied a refund for my item.

title: Arm holes too big
review_text: Why are the armpits so big....

title: The picture is much better than the product.
review_text: I was disappointed with this product. The material is so thin and therefore, the product feels cheap. I wore it to a spinning class and it stuck to me, was not breathable and quickly stained from my sweat marks. Saddened by the decrease in quality of this brand which I used to adore.

title: Feels like it’s choking me
review_text: Compared to the original sculpt tank with the open back. This new style feels like it’s choking me. Tighter around the neck and a bit shorter then the original one. Maybe I will size up next time.
